hotel_description:
Furama Resort Danang—a five-star beachfront retreat with a rich historical legacy and a pioneering role in Vietnam’s hospitality industry—offers an exceptional getaway for travelers seeking refined luxury. Just a 10-minute drive from the Marble Mountains and within easy reach of UNESCO World Heritage Sites, the resort provides a serene coastal escape with breathtaking views of the East Sea and world-class facilities.

The resort is conveniently located only 15 minutes from Danang International Airport.

Elegant & Timeless Accommodations

Furama Resort Danang features spacious rooms and villas designed in sophisticated Indochine style with warm, soothing tones that inspire relaxation. Each accommodations includes air conditioning, a flat-screen TV, tea/coffee facilities, and a private balcony overlooking the ocean, swimming pool, or lush tropical gardens.
The elegant marble bathrooms offer separate rain showers and premium amenities for ultimate comfort.

A Journey of Diverse Culinary Experiences

Hai Van Lounge – Artistic cocktails, afternoon tea, and live music in a stylish atmosphere.

Taya House – A vegetarian mushroom hotpot restaurant offering wholesome, flavorful dining.

Danaksara – Celebrating authentic Vietnamese cuisine with creative presentations of local delicacies.

Family Activities & Kids’ Experiences

The resort’s dedicated kids’ club features safe, fun, and creative play areas designed to keep young guests entertained throughout their stay.

hotel_description:
Presenting Vietnamese charm and Japanese hospitality, Hôtel du Parc Hanoï is surrounded by Thong Nhat Park in Hai Ba Trung district in Hanoi. The hotel features 2 on-site restaurants, outdoor pool and fitness center. Guests can enjoy free WiFi access in all areas and free private parking.

Beautifully decorated in pleasant cream shade, all guestrooms and suites are generously-sized and furnished with large windows enjoy plenty of natural light. Air-conditioned units come with a seating area, personal safe, wardrobe and cable flat-screen TV. For your convenience, a tea/coffee maker, mini-bar and an electric kettle are included. Private bathroom has either a bathtub or shower, free toiletries and a hairdryer.

Guests can recharge with a massage, enjoy a sauna session at the spa or head for a good workout at the gym. Handmade gifts and bags are sold at the hotel's lobby, great of last minute souvenir shopping. Professional staff at the tour desk and 24-hour front desk can assist you with a variety of services, including tour arrangements, airport transfer, ticketing and other concierge services.

Hôtel du Parc Hanoï is within 10-minute drive to popular attractions in Hanoi, including Hoan Kiem Lake, Ngoc Son Temple and Hanoi's Old Quarter area. The nearest airport is Noi Bai International Airport, a 50-minute drive away.

Offering Hanoi's street views, Voyage Restaurant serves international delights and is available for all-day dining. Japanese dishes can be sampled at Azabu Restaurant. Guests can also relax and enjoy drinks at Le Salon Bar.
hotel_address: 84 Tran Nhan Tong Street, Hai Ba Trung, Hanoi, Vietnam

hotel_description:
Kin Hotel Dong Du, a proud member of the Kin Hotel Group, was newly renovated in 2024 to offer guests a refreshed and comfortable experience. Ideally located in District 1, the hotel is just a 15-minute walk from Ben Thanh Market, 2 minutes from Bach Dang Wharf and the Saigon Waterbus, and 5 minutes from the upcoming metro station. A short stroll also takes you to the lively Nguyen Hue Walking Street, placing you right at the heart of Ho Chi Minh City's cultural and commercial hub. Surrounded by top shopping destinations like Saigon Center, Takashimaya, and Vincom Center, Kin Hotel Dong Du offers unmatched convenience for both business and leisure travelers.

Inspired by the movie "Kingsman", Kin Hotel Dong Du brings together vintage style and modern comfort. The decor of our lobby, reflects the classic, stylish look of a Kingsman office, never fails to impress those who walk through our doors. The warm, retro vibe, combined with touches of mystery, creates a perfect retreat for those seeking a peaceful stay in central Saigon.

All rooms at Kin Hotel Dong Du come with free WiFi, air conditioning, a mini-bar, smart TV, safe, and a seating area with a desk. Our Grand City View and Premium City View rooms feature luxurious bathtubs for added comfort. After a long day out, enjoy the thoughtful amenities we’ve prepared for you, from the quality toiletries to cozy slippers and instant coffee to help you recharge.

Our 24-hour front desk staff is available to assist with luggage storage and quick check-in or check-out. We also offer airport transfers and tour packages to enhance your stay in Vietnam.

Spacious units also come equipped with a seating area with sofa, cable flat-screen TV and personal safe. Private bathroom has a bathtub, shower and free toiltries.

Guests can indulge in pampering massages, take a sauna/steam bath session or enjoy a dip in the hot tub at the spa center. The hotel operates a tour desk and 24-hour front desk where professional staff can assist you with luggage storage, currency exchange, day trip arrangement and airport transfer services. Other facilities include a business center, meeting/conference rooms and casino.

Within walking distance, guests can reach many popular tourist attractions of the city, including the iconic Bitexco Financial Tower, Opera House, City Hall and Ben Thanh Market. Tan Son Nhat International Airport is a 30-minute drive from Renaissance Riverside Hotel Saigon.

Viet Kitchen features modern dining setting and serves a wide range of Vietnamese  and international dishes, while Kabin offers authentic Cantonese cuisine. Guests can unwind at the Liquid Sky Bar on the rooftop, or enjoy a favorite beverage at Atrium Lounge.

The aparthotel provides free on-site parking, ensuring convenience for all visitors. Prime Location: Located less than 0.6 mi from Hang Nga Crazy House, the property is 21 mi from Lien Khuong Airport. Nearby attractions include Lam Vien Square, Xuan Huong Lake, and Yersin Park Da Lat, each 1.9 mi away. Boating is available in the surrounding area.
hotel_address: 20b Đồng Tâm, 66115 Da Lat, Vietnam
